title: Worktree merge gates on commands.test (impacted); config rewired
action: Per CONTEXT D5 + plan-check P1-4/P1-1. In handleWorktreeMerge (.bee/bin/bee.mjs ~:3546 and template twin skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs — edit BOTH identically): gate command becomes configCommands.test || configCommands.verify (verifySkipped loud-warning path byte-untouched). Set .bee/config.json commands.test to 'node scripts/run_verify.mjs --impacted-from-git' (commands.verify unchanged — test_verify_manifest asserts its substring). Extend scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs: (a) merge prefers commands.test when present, falls back to commands.verify when absent; (b) P1-4 regression — a REAL staged merge (git merge --no-ff --no-commit fixture) with a registry-mapped changed file must show the gate actually enumerating staged changes and running >0 suites, never the trivial '0 suites' pass. P1-1: bee.mjs closure changed — re-run node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --write, commit refreshed registry. Regenerate release manifest (--write), ledger parity green.
verify: node scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
